subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses and made them a cause of joy unto all the worlds. Blessed is he who hath recognized them and believed in them when they were sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات و جعلها عله فرح العالمین طوبی لمن عرفها و آمن بها اذ نزلت من
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
